zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de Estonteville於大約1185年出生在英國越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯時，她的父親Roger d'Estouteville16歲，母親STUTEVILLE14歲。她於1206年與Sir Herbert St Quintin在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de Estonteville于大约1185年出生在英国越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯时，她的父亲Roger d'Estouteville16岁，母亲STUTEVILLE14岁。她于1206年与Sir Herbert St Quintin在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de Estonteville was born about 1185, in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England, her father, Roger d'Estouteville, was 16 and her mother, STUTEVILLE, was 14. She married Sir Herbert St Quintin in 1206, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne d’Estonteville est née environ 1185, à Burton Agnes, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger d'Estouteville, avait 16 ans et sa mère, STUTEVILLE, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Herbert St Quintin en 1206, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Estonteville è nata il circa 1185 nel Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Roger d'Estouteville, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, STUTEVILLE, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Sir Herbert St Quintin nel 1206, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de Estontevilleが約1185年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブルトン アグネスで生まれた時，父Roger d'Estoutevilleは16歳，母STUTEVILLEは14歳であった。1206年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Herbert St Quintinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.Of Brandesburton, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 브랜데스버턴
ko.lifeSummary: Anne de Estonteville(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 요르크실르 버턴 애그니스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger d'Estouteville(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 STUTEVILLE(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1206년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir Herbert St Quintin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Estonteville nasceu aproximadamente 1185, em Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger d'Estouteville, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, STUTEVILLE, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Herbert St Quintin em 1206, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.Of Brandesburton, Yorkshire, England: брэндесбуртон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de Estonteville родилась около 1185 г. в местности буртон агнесь, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger d'Estouteville было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали STUTEVILLE, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Herbert St Quintin в 1206 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери.
